title: UX Visual-Regression Harness and Desktop-Viewport Acceptance Matrix
updatePolicy: Do not blindly auto-accept changed screenshots. Any image update requires a paired implementation note explaining the UI intent, the affected viewport, and the expected controls that changed.

entries.reviewNotes: Desktop title screen must keep the primary navigation readable without horizontal overflow.
entries.updateRules: Update only when main-menu hierarchy intentionally changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Intermediate desktop viewport catches nav spacing regressions between full HD and laptop.
entries.updateRules: Update only after menu spacing or nav layout changes are reviewed.

entries.reviewNotes: Laptop viewport should not crop the first-run navigation.
entries.updateRules: Update only for intentional menu action hierarchy changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Fresh campaign must select Salto Outskirts via stable border_village node id and keep the primary action above the fold.
entries.updateRules: Update only with campaign-shell layout changes; mission logic must remain unchanged.

entries.reviewNotes: Laptop campaign map must avoid page scrolling in the default map tab and preserve non-overlap.
entries.updateRules: Update only when the desktop acceptance spec changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Selected unlocked mission shows title, type, state, objective, reward preview, pacing, and primary action.
entries.updateRules: Update only for intentional selected-mission panel information architecture changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Locked Aether Well preview must show lock reason and disabled primary action without scroll.
entries.updateRules: Update only if locked-node preview IA is intentionally revised.

entries.reviewNotes: Map tab remains the primary campaign surface.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed campaign-map layout changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Stronghold tab uses compact card hierarchy and avoids long dashboard sprawl.
entries.updateRules: Update only when Stronghold presentation changes intentionally.

entries.reviewNotes: Hero tab prioritizes hero summary and Retinue state without adding roster sprawl.
entries.updateRules: Update only when hero campaign presentation changes intentionally.

entries.reviewNotes: Inventory tab should remain a launch pad to Hero Inventory, not a full inventory rewrite.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed campaign inventory-entry changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Intel tab should summarize rival and chapter state without overwhelming the map shell.
entries.updateRules: Update only when Intel content hierarchy changes intentionally.

entries.reviewNotes: Reputation tab must remain compact and readable.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed reputation presentation changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Battle HUD should be readable and uncluttered before any special mission layer appears.
entries.updateRules: Update only after HUD shell changes pass layout assertions.

entries.reviewNotes: Selected unit role/order summary must fit without command-panel overflow.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed unit-selection panel changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Selected Command Hall controls must fit the laptop HUD.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed building-command panel changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Contested site status should be visible without colliding with objectives or minimap.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed capture-site readability changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Private Lume demo inactive state is eligible only in private package posture.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed Lume demo HUD changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Active Linked Ward state must keep Finish Demo visible.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed active Lume-state presentation changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Selected Lume site should expose link summary without hiding battlefield controls.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed Lume-selection presentation changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Hidden link mode should not remove mission guidance.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed Lume visibility-control changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Always-visible link mode should fit laptop HUD without cluttering objective actions.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed Lume visibility-control changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Private-demo Results compact rescue remains intact with no-save summary above details.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed private-demo Results IA changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Expanded private-demo details remain deliberate progressive disclosure.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed private-demo Results IA changes.

entries.reviewNotes: Ordinary victory Results must keep outcome, mission, rewards, XP, veterans, and actions above the fold.
entries.updateRules: Update only after Results IA changes are reviewed against reward safety.

entries.reviewNotes: Ordinary defeat Results must keep retry/prep actions above the fold.
entries.updateRules: Update only after Results IA changes are reviewed against defeat flow.

entries.reviewNotes: Replay Results must retain already-claimed/replay-safe copy and visible actions.
entries.updateRules: Update only after replay Results presentation changes are reviewed.

entries.reviewNotes: Tutorial remains simple and protected from private-demo or Lume complexity.
entries.updateRules: Update only with reviewed Tutorial shell changes.
